title: EasyFi - REKT
relevance_summary: Compromised admin key leading to unauthorized access and theft of funds
funds_lost: 6 million in stablecoins and ~53 million in EASY tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a known compromised address

red_flags: single user or device with access to treasury
summary: The EasyFi hack involved the theft of millions of dollars worth of stablecoins and tokens due to a compromised admin key. A guard could have blocked transactions from known compromised addresses to prevent such incidents.
